items.name: snyk/agent-scan
review_questions: What license governs reuse or summary?
Does the repository inspect agent/tool behavior without requiring blind execution?
Can it produce reusable safety review procedures rather than tool-specific instructions?
Does it identify prompt injection, setup-command, dependency, or MCP/tool execution failure modes relevant to this repo?

items.name: awslabs/mcp
review_questions: What license and attribution requirements apply?
Which MCP server workflows are procedural enough to profile?
Which install or runtime steps involve network, credentials, filesystem writes, or external-system mutation?
Should this remain a source profile rather than normalized skill content?

items.name: QuantaAlpha/GitTaskBench
review_questions: Can its task/evaluation structure define acceptance criteria for skills?
Does it provide reusable failure taxonomy around setup, dependencies, repo context, and tests?
Can it improve validation gates without copying benchmark content?

items.name: carlyrichmond/context-engineering-ai-agent
review_questions: Is the repository actively maintained and licensed?
Does it contain reusable context-engineering procedure beyond a single app example?
Does it require credentials or external integrations to evaluate?
